description.en:
Attacks an enemy.

Before attacking, if the caster's current Health is <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> or lower, recovers Health of the <color=#28d9ed>caster</color> by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>.

Before attacking, if the caster's current Health is greater than <color=#28d9ed>85%</color>, recovers Health of the ally with the lowest Health by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> of Nella's Max Health.
description.kr:
적을 공격합니다.

공격 전 자신의 현재 체력이 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 이하라면 <color=#28d9ed>자신</color> 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>를 회복합니다.

공격 전 자신의 현재 체력이 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color>를 초과한다면 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군의 체력을 넬라 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color>만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.jp:
敵単体にダメージを与える。

攻撃前、自分の残りHPが<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>以下の場合、<color=#28d9ed>自分</color>のHPを<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>回復する。

攻撃前、自分の残りHPが<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>を超える場合、残りHPが最も低い味方のHPをネラの最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>回復する。
description.zh:
攻击敌人。

攻击前,自身的当前生命值为<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>以下时,恢复相当于<color=#28d9ed>自身</color>生命值的<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。

攻击前,自身的当前生命值超过<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>时,使生命值最低的友军恢复相当于内拉生命值上限
<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>的生命值。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) When hit, activates an <color=#28d9ed>Agile Response</color>.\nIncreases Priority of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>70%</color>, and recovers <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> of Nella's Max Health.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>신속 대응</color> 효과가 발동합니다.\n자신의 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 증가하며, 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 넬라 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)ダメージを受けた時、<color=#28d9ed>【迅速対応】</color>を発動する。\n【迅速対応】:自分の行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>UPし、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>をネラの最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復する。
description.zh: (触发效果)受到攻击时,触发<color=#28d9ed>迅速应对</color>效果。\n自身的行动值增加<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>,并使全体友军恢复相当于内拉生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>。

description.en: Increases Priority of surviving allies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, then <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects (Greater)</color> all dead allies. Afterward, recovers <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> of Nella's Max Health, and grants Immunity for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 생존한 아군의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킨 후, 사망한 아군 전체를 <color=#28d9ed>부활(강화)</color>시킵니다. 이후 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 넬라 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>만큼 회복시키고, <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 면역을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 戦場にいる味方の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせた後、倒れた味方全体を<color=#28d9ed>復活(強化)</color>させる。その後、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>をネラの最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復させ、免疫を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 使存活的友军行动值提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>后,<color=#28d9ed>复活(强化)</color>阵亡的全体友军。随后使全体友军恢复相当于内拉生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>,并赋予<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>的免疫效果。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> proportional to missing Health. <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> can increase up to <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n残りHPが低いほど<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>がUPする。<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>は最大<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n生命值越低,<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>越高。<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>最多提升\n<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。

name.jp: パンデモニウムの指導者

description.en: At the start of the turn, if all allies except the caster are <color=#28d9ed>dead</color>, resets the skill cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Coronation</color>.
description.kr: 턴 시작 시 자신을 제외한 모든 아군이 <color=#28d9ed>사망</color>했다면 <color=#28d9ed>대관식</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 초기화됩니다.
description.jp: ターン開始時、自分を除く味方全体が<color=#28d9ed>倒れた</color>場合、<color=#28d9ed>【即位の儀】</color>のスキルターンが初期化される。
description.zh: 回合开始时,如果除自身以外的所有友军均<color=#28d9ed>已阵亡</color>,则重置<color=#28d9ed>加冕礼</color>的技能冷却时间。
